🌿 About Naturopathy
Naturopathy is a system of medicine that recognises the body's inherent ability to heal itself — Vis Medicatrix Naturae. It combines evidence-based natural therapies with modern clinical science to treat the whole person.
🌱
First Do No HarmPrimum Non Nocere — least invasive first
🔬
Identify Root CauseTolle Causam — treat cause, not symptoms
🧘
Treat the Whole PersonPhysical · Mental · Emotional · Spiritual
🎓
Doctor as TeacherDocere — educate and empower patients
🛡️
PreventionHealth is more than absence of disease
🌊
Support Healing PowerThe body's intelligence heals itself
🌿 Herbal Medicine 💧 Hydrotherapy 🧘 Yoga & Pranayama 🌍 Mud Therapy 💆 Massage Therapy ⚡ Fasting Therapy 👆 Acupressure ☀️ Chromotherapy
🟡 Today's Clinical Pearl
Loading…
🏛️ Top Naturopathy Colleges ›
🏥
SDM College of Naturopathy & Yogic Sciences
Ujire, Karnataka, India · Est. 1979
›
India's premier BNYS institution, affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences. Offers BNYS, PG Diploma, and PhD programs. Known for research in yoga therapy and integrative medicine. 500-bed naturopathy hospital attached.
🌐 Website 📍 Map 📞 08256-230455
🏥
JSS Institute of Naturopathy & Yogic Sciences
Mysuru, Karnataka, India
›
Part of JSS Academy of Higher Education & Research. Offers BNYS degree affiliated to RGUHS. Integrated 100-bed naturopathy hospital with hydrotherapy, yoga, and mud therapy facilities. Strong clinical training program.
🌐 Website 📍 Map
🏛️
Govt. Naturopathy & Yoga Medical College
Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
›
Government-run BNYS college under the Tamil Nadu Dr. MGR Medical University. Offers BNYS and PG programs. Adjacent government naturopathy hospital provides extensive clinical exposure. One of India's oldest government naturopathy institutions.
🌐 University 📍 Map
🏥
INYS College of Naturopathy & Yogic Sciences
Thrissur, Kerala, India
›
Affiliated to Kerala University of Health Sciences (KUHS). Offers BNYS degree with strong focus on clinical naturopathy. Located in Kerala, known for its integration of traditional healing with modern naturopathic practices. 200-bed hospital facility.
🌐 University 📍 Map
🎓
Bastyr University
Kenmore, Washington, USA
›
The world's leading naturopathic medicine research university. Offers ND (Doctor of Naturopathic Medicine), MS, and PhD programs. Bastyr Center for Natural Health is the largest natural medicine clinic in the USA. Pioneer in evidence-based natural medicine research.
🌐 bastyr.edu 📍 Map 📞 +1 425-502-3000
🎓
National University of Natural Medicine
Portland, Oregon, USA
›
North America's oldest accredited naturopathic medical school, founded in 1956. Offers ND, MS, and doctoral programs. The NUNM Health Centers provide integrated clinical training. Strong focus on botanical medicine, homeopathy, and classical naturopathy.
🌐 nunm.edu 📍 Map 📞 +1 503-552-5552
🎓
Canadian College of Naturopathic Medicine
Toronto, Ontario, Canada
›
Canada's premier naturopathic medical school, accredited by CAND. Offers 4-year ND program with clinical training at the Robert Schad Naturopathic Clinic. Trains the majority of Canada's licensed NDs. Strong research programs in integrative cancer care and women's health.
🌐 ccnm.edu 📍 Map 📞 +1 416-498-1255
🎓
Southern School of Natural Therapies
Melbourne, Australia
›
Australia's leading natural therapies college, established 1961. Offers Bachelor of Health Science (Naturopathy), Advanced Diploma programs. Located in Melbourne's health precinct. Known for clinical naturopathy, nutritional medicine, and Western herbal medicine programs.
🌐 ssnt.edu.au 📍 Map 📞 +61 3 9207 8722
🏥 Top Naturopathy Hospitals in India & World ›
🏥
SDM Naturopathy Hospital
Ujire, Karnataka, India
›
500-bed attached hospital · NABH accredited · India's largest naturopathy inpatient facility · Panchakarma + hydrotherapy + yoga therapy.
🌐 Website
🏥
Jindal Naturecure Institute
Bangalore, Karnataka, India
›
India's most prominent naturopathy wellness hospital · 200+ beds · Founded 1978 · Treats NCDs: obesity, T2DM, HTN, arthritis with residential programmes.
🌐 Website
🏥
Govt. Naturopathy Hospital Chennai
Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
›
Government run · Free treatment for BPL patients · Attached to Govt. Naturopathy & Yoga Medical College · Major OPD volume.
🌐 University
🏥
SVYASA Yoga University Hospital
Bangalore, Karnataka, India
›
Swami Vivekananda Yoga Anusandhana Samsthana · Major research + clinical yoga therapy centre · Publications in JAMA, Lancet for yoga RCTs.
🌐 Website
🏥
NCN Naturopathy Centre Pune
Pune, Maharashtra, India
›
Nature Cure Niketan · Long established residential naturopathy centre · Focus on fasting therapy, hydrotherapy, and diet-based reversal programmes.
🌐 Website
🏥
Bastyr Center for Natural Health
Seattle, Washington, USA
›
Largest natural medicine outpatient clinic in North America · Integrative oncology, women's health, gut health · Teaching clinic of Bastyr University.
🌐 Website
📰 Key Health & Naturopathy News ›
📰
WHO Traditional Medicine Strategy 2025–2034
World Health Organization · 2024
›
WHO commits to integrating traditional and complementary medicine into global health systems, recognising naturopathy, yoga therapy and Ayurveda worldwide.
🌐 Read
📰
National AYUSH Mission Expands BNYS Infrastructure
Ministry of AYUSH · India · 2024
›
Ministry of AYUSH strengthens BNYS curriculum standards and expands naturopathy hospital infrastructure across 18 states under National AYUSH Mission 2024.
🌐 Read
📰
Yoga Effective for Chronic Low Back Pain — Cochrane Review
Cochrane Database · 2022
›
Updated Cochrane systematic review confirms yoga produces clinically meaningful improvements in back-related function and pain vs usual care in chronic non-specific LBP.
🌐 PubMed
📰
Plant-Based Diet Reduces LDL by 10–20% — Meta-Analysis
European Heart Journal · 2023
›
Large meta-analysis of plant-based dietary patterns confirms significant reductions in LDL cholesterol, apolipoprotein B, and cardiovascular disease risk markers.
🌐 PubMed
📰
Mediterranean Diet Reduces Cardiovascular Events — PREDIMED
NEJM · Landmark Trial
›
PREDIMED trial shows Mediterranean diet supplemented with extra-virgin olive oil or nuts reduces major cardiovascular events by ~30% vs low-fat control diet.
🌐 PubMed
📰
KSM-66 Ashwagandha Reduces Stress & Cortisol — RCT
Indian J Psychol Med · PMID 23439798
›
Double-blind RCT: KSM-66 ashwagandha 300mg BD for 60 days significantly reduces serum cortisol (p=0.0006) and all stress-assessment scale scores vs placebo.
🌐 PubMed
🔬 Latest Naturopathy Research ›
🔬
PC6 Acupressure for Chemotherapy-Induced Nausea — Meta-Analysis
Support Care Cancer · PMID 37548707
›
Meta-analysis of 10 RCTs (975 patients): PC6 acupressure significantly reduces acute and delayed chemotherapy-induced nausea and vomiting in cancer patients.
🌐 PubMed
🔬
Mud Therapy (Pelotherapy) for Knee Osteoarthritis — Meta-Analysis
Medicine (Baltimore) · PMID 33752056
›
Meta-analysis of 11 RCTs (1106 patients): mud therapy significantly reduces VAS pain scores and improves WOMAC function in knee osteoarthritis with low heterogeneity.
🌐 PubMed
🔬
Intermittent Fasting in Metabolic Syndrome — Systematic Review
J Obes Metab Syndr · PMID 39553053
›
Systematic review of 11 studies: intermittent fasting significantly reduces weight, BMI, LDL cholesterol, and blood pressure — a promising non-pharmacological strategy for metabolic syndrome.
🌐 PubMed
🔬
Diet & Exercise Reverse NAFLD — Systematic Review
J Hepatol · PMID 34924606
›
Systematic review confirms 7–10% body weight reduction via diet and exercise resolves NAFLD steatosis, improves liver enzymes, and can reverse fibrosis in the majority of patients.
🌐 PubMed
🔬
Yoga Improves QoL in Cancer Survivors — Meta-Analysis
Asia Pac J Oncol Nurs · PMID 38426042
›
Updated meta-analysis of 34 RCTs: yoga significantly improves physical function, mental health, and overall quality of life in cancer survivors across cancer types.
🌐 PubMed
🔬
Ashwagandha for Stress & Anxiety — Systematic Review & Meta-Analysis
Health Sci Rep · PMID 39348746
›
Meta-analysis of 9 RCTs (558 patients): Ashwagandha formulations significantly reduce Perceived Stress Scale scores, anxiety (GAD-7), and cortisol with good safety profile.
🌐 PubMed
